steps.title: Convert the volume units
steps.content:
Since $1$ meter is $100$ centimeters, one cubic meter is
$$
100^3=1{,}000{,}000
$$
cubic centimeters. So
$$
0.72(1{,}000{,}000)=720{,}000
$$
cubic centimeters.

steps.title: Convert to quarts
steps.content: Use $946.35$ cubic centimeters per quart, so divide the converted volume by the number of cubic centimeters in one quart: $$ \frac{720{,}000}{946.35}=760.82 $$ rounded to the nearest listed value. The answer is D.
